_comment: Project MCP servers for Claude Code. Define local stdio and approved remote HTTP servers here; secrets via env, never inline. Copy .cursor/mcp.example.json -> .cursor/mcp.json (gitignored) for Cursor. Naming convention: <scope>-<ro|rw>-<purpose> (ro/read = read-only, rw/write = write-capable). Prefer a compact search+dispatch surface over many raw tools.

proj-ro-fff._comment: Optional local stdio read-only file search — https://github.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff . Tools: ffgrep, fffind, fff-multi-grep

proj-ro-docs._comment: Example remote HTTP read-only MCP server. Remote examples are disabled by default; set enabled=true only after review.

proj-rw-issues._comment: Example remote HTTP write-capable MCP server. All auth uses env references only; write tools require human approval before side effects.
proj-rw-issues.approval_note: Required before creating, updating, deleting, or dispatching issue tracker actions.
